## calcInGivenOut variable

Calculate the expected amount of asset X needed to put in to get a certain amount of asset Y out.

**Signature:**

```typescript
calcInGivenOut: (tokenBalanceIn: BigNumber, tokenWeightIn: BigNumber, tokenBalanceOut: BigNumber, tokenWeightOut: BigNumber, tokenAmountOut: BigNumber, swapFee: BigNumber) => Decimal
```
